chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1298 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal 04.05.2026 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2023 without any progress and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution of appeal. Office note demonstrates that existence of numerous objections that have not been complied with ostensibly since 06.07.2023. Even today learned counsel has no justification for default. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
